input.production_format: Observational documentary with some sit-down interviews
input.environment: Mixed interior/exterior, urban setting, temperate climate
input.crew: Director (also self-shoots some days), Camera Operator, Sound Recordist
input.camera_preference: Sony FX9 or equivalent cinema-style documentary camera
input.audio: Observational sound with boom, plus 3 radio mics for multi-subject scenes
input.lighting: Natural light for observational; portable interview kit

input.production_format: Observational documentary following subjects across multiple European cities
input.environment: Mixed interior/exterior, multiple climates (Scandinavian winter, Mediterranean summer), urban and rural
input.crew: Director, Camera Operator, Sound Recordist, Production Coordinator (4-person crew)
input.camera_preference: ARRI AMIRA or Sony FX9 — broadcast/cinema hybrid
input.audio: Observational boom work, 4 radio mics, ambience recording kit for location sound design
input.lighting: Minimal — natural light preferred, small LED interview kit only
input.special_requirements: Drone for establishing shots, lightweight gimbal for train/vehicle sequences
input.transport_constraints: Flying between locations with checked and hand luggage — kit must be airline-transportable
